attributes.action: Make bus fare for college students
attributes.additional_details: Bus fare for students is too expensive and not everyone can pay it nor can everyone apply for a Bursary so per week to get the bus students are spending £18.30 and if they use a child ticket and caught out for it they then have to pay £50.
attributes.background: Make college an accessible place via bus. Bus fare for a student is £6.10, most students are in college for three days so a student day rider for three days = £18.30 not everyone is able to pay that and not everyone is able to apply for a bursary.
